headline: Synthetic public company used to show how OpenCompliance can publish scoped assurance artifacts without over-claiming full-framework compliance.
targetAudiences: contributors evaluating the public artifact model
declaredAssuranceIntent: show what ExampleCo can prove today
show which claims remain documentary attestations
show how blocked controls become a typed punch-list instead of being hidden
note: Synthetic public-safe organisation description for the ExampleCo showcase.
